summary: Subtract the feature's owned doc/review artifacts from the prerequisite-freshness change-set identity (ChangeSetIdentity.Compute exclusion overload + CycleService.FreshnessIdentity helper used by Check+Status; thread excludedOwnedPaths into ValidateTransitionReadiness's Check). The only diff stage (implement) has no produces, so a later owned artifact (the /08 report) no longer stales it, while a real code change still does.
